summary: Classified the five open PR inventory items independently. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive signal was present, low-signal closure is disabled, and the job blocks merge/fix/raise-PR actions. All five PRs should remain open on their normal maintainer/review paths.

actions.reason: Independent useful feature PR with active review findings; keep open and do not close, merge, or relabel from this inventory shard.
Focused contributor bug-fix PR with missing required proof; keep open for proof/review rather than close or route elsewhere.
Broad useful feature PR that requires normal maintainer/product review and clean CI; keep open without treating it as duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or merge-ready.
Small focused bug-fix PR with sufficient proof but still requiring maintainer review and CI resolution; keep open without closing or merging.
Focused open CLI PR with review infrastructure failure rather than a maintainer decision or closeout basis; keep open for normal review retry.
